title: Raymond Bowen
compiled_truth: Raymond Bowen is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-05), Raymond Bowen sent 17 and received 859 emails, totalling 876 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeffrey Mcmahon](people/jeffrey-mcmahon) (11), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (6), [Rick Buy](people/rick-buy) (5), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (5), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (5). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, inbox, pr_crisis_management.
